title: • Tasks:
content:
• Tasks:
• Complete the Writing Warm-Up (a brief exercise to activate ideas).
• Engage in the Discussion post (reflect on the week’s topic).
• Work on Prewriting & Thesis Development for the assignment.
2. Tuesday: Rough Draft & Development
• Readings: Review additional resources on drafting techniques (provided as linked documents/videos in the “Lecture Content”).
• Tasks:
• Work on your Rough Draft for the current essay assignment.
• Focus on incorporating key concepts from the readings (structure, transitions, voice, etc.).
3. Wednesday: Peer Review, Grammar & Writing Mechanics
• Readings: Review “Grammar & Writing Mechanics” handouts (available in the module) that correspond to the week’s focus.
• Tasks:
• Submit your draft for Peer Review.
• Use the provided Peer Feedback Template (see below) to review at least one peer’s work.
• Complete the Knowledge Checks (e.g., on sentence structure, grammar rules).
